member.name: F:CloudPub.CloudPubEndpointsBuilder.Endpoints
member.summary: Final list of endpoints.

member.name: T:CloudPub.HostedCloudPubLifecycleService
member.summary: Hosted service that connects the CloudPub client during host startup, publishes configured endpoints, adds their public URLs to , and unpublishes them on shutdown.
member.param: The ASP.NET Core server whose address list is updated with published URLs.

member.name: M:CloudPub.HostedCloudPubLifecycleService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{CloudPub.HostedCloudPubLifecycleService},CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting.Server.IServer,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Hosted service that connects the CloudPub client during host startup, publishes configured endpoints, adds their public URLs to , and unpublishes them on shutdown.
member.param: The ASP.NET Core server whose address list is updated with published URLs.

member.name: P:CloudPub.HostedCloudPubLifecycleService.Endpoints
member.summary: Gets the collection of registered endpoints as an array.
member.remarks: The returned array contains all endpoints that have been registered. Modifications to the collection of endpoints after retrieval will not affect the returned array.

member.name: T:CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder
member.summary: Provides a contract for configuring and adding publish endpoints for cloud-based messaging services.
member.remarks: Implementations of this interface allow developers to specify options for publishing messages to cloud services. Endpoints added through this builder should be properly configured to ensure reliable message delivery.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder.AddPublishEndpoint(CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions)
member.summary: Adds a publish endpoint to the builder using the specified cloud publishing options.
member.remarks: Use this method to configure cloud publishing for the application. Ensure that all required properties of the options parameter are set to valid values to avoid configuration errors at runtime.
member.param: The options that configure the publish endpoint, including target environment, authentication, and other publishing settings. Cannot be null.

member.name: T:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Dependency injection registration helpers for CloudPub client and publish endpoints.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers as using of .

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,CloudPub.Components.ICloudPubClient})
member.summary: Registers a custom factory that produces the singleton .
member.param: Factory that creates the client instance.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,CloudPub.Options.CloudPubClientOptions)
member.summary: Registers as with explicit options.
member.param: Client options instance (not bound from configuration).

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCloudPub(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Binds from configuration and registers .
member.param: Configuration section or root for client options.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,CloudPub.Options.CloudPubPublishOptions)
member.summary: Registers a publish profile so publishes it at application startup.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.UInt16,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers an HTTP (or other) endpoint on localhost at the given port.
member.param: Optional description for the published endpoint.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers a publish profile using a string address (port, host:port, path, or URL depending on protocol).
member.param: Local bind specification as accepted by .
Optional description for the published endpoint.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers a publish profile with empty address; useful when the address is supplied elsewhere or protocol-specific defaults apply.
member.param: Optional description for the published endpoint.

member.name: M:CloudPub.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder})
member.summary: Registers a publish profile so publishes it at application startup.

member.name: T:CloudPub.CloudPubEndpointsBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering publish endpoints with a cloud publishing service builder.
member.remarks: These extension methods enable the configuration of publish endpoints using various specifications, such as local TCP ports, string addresses, or protocol-specific defaults. They support optional naming and protocol type selection, allowing for flexible endpoint registration in cloud-based applications.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubEndpointsBuilderExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder,System.UInt16,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers an HTTP (or other) endpoint on localhost at the given port.
member.param: Optional description for the published endpoint.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubEndpointsBuilderExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder,System.String,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers a publish profile using a string address (port, host:port, path, or URL depending on protocol).
member.param: Local bind specification as accepted by .
Optional description for the published endpoint.

member.name: M:CloudPub.CloudPubEndpointsBuilderExtensions.AddPublishEndpoint(CloudPub.ICloudPubEndpointsBuilder,System.String,CloudPub.Protocol.ProtocolType)
member.summary: Registers a publish profile with empty address; useful when the address is supplied elsewhere or protocol-specific defaults apply.
member.param: Optional description for the published endpoint.
